name: Gem-Knight Topaz
name_jp: ジェムナイト・パーズ
desc:
"Gem-Knight Tourmaline" + 1 "Gem-Knight" monster
Must first be Fusion Summoned with the above Fusion Materials. Can make a second attack during each Battle Phase. If this card destroys a monster by battle and sends it to the GY: Inflict damage to your opponent equal to that monster's original ATK.
mnst_eff:
"Gem-Knight Tourmaline" + 1 "Gem-Knight" monster
Must first be Fusion Summoned with the above Fusion Materials. Can make a second attack during each Battle Phase. If this card destroys a monster by battle and sends it to the GY: Inflict damage to your opponent equal to that monster's original ATK.
eff:

Must first be Fusion Summoned with the above Fusion Materials. Can make a second attack during each Battle Phase. If this card destroys a monster by battle and sends it to the GY: Inflict damage to your opponent equal to that monster's original ATK.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
summoning: Must be Fusion Summoned with listed Fusion Materials
Requires specific Normal Monsters as Fusion Materials
